name: digital-wellbeing-activity-monitor
description: Full-stack Digital Wellbeing and macOS activity monitoring dashboard.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace backend" "npm run dev --workspace frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace backend && npm run build --workspace frontend && npm run build --workspace desktop-agent
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace frontend && npm run lint --workspace backend && npm run lint --workspace desktop-agent
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace frontend && npm run typecheck --workspace backend && npm run typecheck --workspace desktop-agent
